basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Silchar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD/EWS candidates will get relaxation as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE and M.Tech/M.E in ECE or equivalent, B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE, Minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category, Minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE and M.Tech/M.E in ECE or equivalent OR B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in ECE. Minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category. Minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category. (or 7.5/10 CGPA for B.Tech only under GEN etc.)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
